phase_statuses.claim: focused one-step deterministic value path passed
focused sequential deterministic likelihood path passed
SV ladder passed in scoped form; native generalized SV remains reference-blocked
nonlinear model ladder passed in scoped diagnostic form; production rows remain blocked
HMC readiness tiers and overclaim guards passed; HMC readiness did not pass
smoothing boundary and overclaim guards passed; smoothing support did not pass
integration closeout reconciles phase claims, blockers, non-goals, and non-claims

supported_claims: scope governance excludes adaptive TT/SIRT source-faithful filtering and S&P 500 reproduction as P50 gaps
deterministic filter loop contract defines HMC-compatible value and gradient path boundaries
focused one-step value path and low-dimensional sequential likelihood path pass reference checks
M4 value-gradient calibration rules are predeclared and guard finite-difference and likelihood-variability misuse
SV dim 1/2/3 strict rows pass for KSC CUT4-vs-Kalman and exact transformed SV Zhao-Cui-vs-dense
KSC Zhao-Cui-vs-dense remains local diagnostic evidence under looser existing tolerances
spatial SIR and predator-prey lower-rung diagnostics pass with production blockers preserved
HMC readiness tiers are defined and guard against finite-gradient overpromotion
smoothing is not required for P50 parameter-HMC filtering and remains explicitly deferred

h1_h8_closure.issue: P49 helpers are scoped but not integrated into a full deterministic filter.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Full production deterministic filtering is not claimed.

h1_h8_closure.issue: Recentring, Jacobian, proposal-correction, and normalizer accounting are not wired end to end.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Nonlinear production route accounting remains subject to model-specific blockers.

h1_h8_closure.issue: Value and gradient correctness need HMC-grade criteria.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Rules do not by themselves prove any model or HMC readiness.

h1_h8_closure.issue: SV and generalized SV model comparisons need deterministic HMC-compatible value and gradient tests.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Native generalized SV same-target equality remains blocked.

h1_h8_closure.issue: Spatial SIR and predator-prey comparisons need deterministic HMC-compatible value and gradient tests.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Production spatial SIR and predator-prey readiness are not claimed.

h1_h8_closure.issue: HMC readiness is not established by finite gradients alone.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Tier 2, Tier 3, and production HMC readiness are not run or passed.

h1_h8_closure.issue: Smoothing/backward conditionals are separate from parameter HMC.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Smoothing is deferred unless latent-path inference becomes a separate reviewed target.

h1_h8_closure.issue: Future artifacts may drift back into source-faithful/adaptive language.
h1_h8_closure.boundary: Adaptive TT/SIRT source-faithful filtering and S&P 500 reproduction are non-goals, not gaps.

route_label_inventory.allowed_claim: phase-scoped deterministic value, gradient, or model-ladder evidence
route_label_inventory.forbidden_claim: source-faithful adaptive TT/SIRT reproduction or production readiness without a production gate

route_label_inventory.allowed_claim: predeclared value and gradient comparison classes
route_label_inventory.forbidden_claim: HMC readiness by finite-gradient or finite-difference diagnostics alone

route_label_inventory.allowed_claim: scoped SV, generalized SV, spatial SIR, and predator-prey diagnostic evidence
route_label_inventory.forbidden_claim: production model readiness from lower-rung or diagnostic rows

route_label_inventory.allowed_claim: tier definitions and explicit readiness blockers
route_label_inventory.forbidden_claim: HMC readiness without Tier 2 and Tier 3 evidence

route_label_inventory.allowed_claim: smoothing deferral and backward-conditional requirements for future smoother claims
route_label_inventory.forbidden_claim: smoothing support from filtering pass tokens

route_label_inventory.allowed_claim: context explaining why P50 chooses deterministic HMC-compatible filtering
route_label_inventory.forbidden_claim: adaptive TT/SIRT source-faithful filtering or S&P 500 reproduction as P50 gaps

remaining_gaps.description: Native generalized SV same-target value/gradient equality lacks an approved exact, dense, or reviewed reference.
Near-paper spatial SIR production route remains blocked by current all-axes retained-grid route architecture.
Predator-prey horizon-25 production candidate remains blocked by production accuracy/tuning criteria.
Hamiltonian/leapfrog and short-chain sampler diagnostics have not been run, so HMC readiness is not established.
The top-level score API remains experimental and is not claimed stable.
Smoothing/backward-conditionals are deferred unless latent-path posterior inference becomes a separate reviewed target.
